results.testCase: Reject leave requests for past dates
results.expectedResult: 400 Bad Request — past dates not allowed
results.recommendedFix: Add server-side validation: startDate must be >= today

results.testCase: Reject when endDate is before startDate
results.recommendedFix: Validate endDate >= startDate in create DTO/service

results.testCase: Block overlapping leave dates for same designer
results.recommendedFix: Query existing PENDING/APPROVED leaves and reject date overlaps on create

results.testCase: Verify leave balance calculations and restrictions
results.expectedResult: Balance tracked; submission blocked when insufficient balance
results.actualResult: No leave balance model or API exists in codebase (schema has no balance fields)
results.evidence: Code review: LeaveRequest schema has no balance/entitlement fields
results.recommendedFix: Add leave entitlement per user; deduct on approval; block over-allocation

results.testCase: Single submission creates exactly one HOD notification per approver
results.expectedResult: 1 notification per HOD for the leave id
Notification available immediately after API response
results.actualResult: API tests show notifications available on next GET immediately after create (LR-011). UI polls every 30s — may appear delayed in bell
results.recommendedFix: Consider WebSocket or shorter poll interval for "real-time" UX

results.expectedResult: PATCH endpoint updates dates/reason while PENDING
results.actualResult: No edit endpoint exists (only POST create and POST review)
results.evidence: Code review: requests.controller has no PATCH /requests/:id for update
results.recommendedFix: Add PATCH /requests/:id for designers on PENDING requests only

results.expectedResult: DELETE or status=CANCELLED for pending requests
results.evidence: Code review: no DELETE or CANCELLED status handling
results.recommendedFix: Add cancel flow with CANCELLED status and HOD notification

results.testCase: Designer cannot access HOD inbox endpoints
HOD can act only on assigned department designers
results.actualResult: Department scoping implemented in code but seed users have no departmentId — all HODs see all designers
results.evidence: seed.ts does not set departmentId; assertReviewerAccess skips check when departmentId null
results.recommendedFix: Seed departments and assign users; add integration test with two departments
Reject duplicate pending requests for same date range

results.expectedResult: Idempotent retry or clear error; no orphan duplicates
results.actualResult: Not automatable without fault injection; no idempotency key on POST /requests
results.recommendedFix: Add client retry with idempotency key or transaction rollback docs

results.actualResult: Standard JWT guard returns 401 for missing/invalid token (not executed in this run)
